rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

rules.rule_text:
title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent
id: 21e44d78-95e7-421b-a464-ffd8395659c4
status: test
description: 'Detects a potentially suspicious empty user agent strings in proxy log.

  Could potentially indicate an uncommon request method.

  '
references:
- https://twitter.com/Carlos_Perez/status/883455096645931008
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2017-07-08
modified: 2021-11-27
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1071.001
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-useragent: ''
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
